text_block_list.text: The day of Yukino Bijin's scrimmage<n>arrives.

After watching over her training with<n>Sakura
Bakushin O, I can't help but<n>feel curious about
how the race will<n>pan out, so I drop by to watch.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, howdy-do!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the right headspace thanks to<n>you 'n
Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All you've gotta do now is race and<n>win! Good
luck, Yukino!
choice_data_list: Show us how cool you can be!
Let's see how much your training's paid off!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I was talk'n to the folks from my<n>hometown, and
they've all got high<n>hopes for me.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: So there's no way I'm losing!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get first place and show<n>'em how
amaz'n I've become!

Yukino Bijin heads off with a<n>confident stride. The
look on her face<n>is a far cry from the one she had
before her intense training.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
All righty! I'm gonna use every trick<n>Bakushin O
taught me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're an Umamusume who's been<n>trained by
the class representative<n>herself! First place is
yours for the<n>taking!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much. I'm gonna run my<n>heart out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Go for it! Your instructor will be<n>watching
attentively from the stands!

We part ways with Yukino Bijin, and I<n>wait for the
race to start alongside<n>Sakura Bakushin O, who
has<n>embraced the role of instructor.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Yukino. I saw a banner with your<n>name on it
just now.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, from my hometown support'rs!<n>They came all
the way here to cheer<n>me on.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really? Well...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My desire to make the folks back<n>home happy is
just as strong as<n>yours. I won't lose today.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: (Oguri wants to win just as much as I<n>do... But...)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yukinooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Yukino Bijiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Y-you guys!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
That's me, Yukino Bijin! I'm gonna<n>show
everyone the kinda guts the<n>snowy lands'll give
ya!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(I really wanna get first place! I<n>wanna run a great
race and hear<n>them call me a city girl!)

With the racers' entrances over, the<n>race is finally
about to begin.

The odds are in Oguri Cap's favor for<n>this race,
but an unexpected<n>Umamusume pulls out to the
front<n>from the get-go...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
When push comes to shove, I get<n>things done!
I'm not gonna lose to<n>Oguri or anyone else!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I'll show ever'one my Morioka spirit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whoooooa! Yukino's pulling further<n>and further
ahead!
choice_data_list: You can do it, Yukino Bijin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That crazed energy is totally<n>class rep
worthy!

If she keeps that up, she's got this... I<n>watch with
bated breath as the race<n>unfolds...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay... I've got you now, Yukino!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
N-not on my watch! You're not tak'n<n>first place
from me!

Oguri Cap pulls off a miraculous<n>chase and
gradually closes the gap<n>with Yukino Bijin. Yukino
Bijin<n>battens down and speeds up, buuut...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: It's Oguri! She came from behind and<n>won it all!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: That other girl... Yukino, was it? Shedid a great job, but ended up insecond. Man, Oguri sure is fast.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Aww... I failed... I wanted to show<n>'em how cool I
could be...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You didn't fail. Listen. Can't you hear<n>them
cheering?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Congrats on second place, Yukino!<n>You're
Morioka's pride and joy!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You've become so fast and<n>magnificent! You're a
true city girl<n>now!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Everyone!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The cheers keep on com'n... like a<n>never-end'n
supply of wanko soba.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
(I did it... I gave my hometown a<n>performance to be
proud of...)

She may have ended up in second<n>place, but it's
clear that today's race<n>has made Yukino Bijin
stronger in<n>both mind and body.
